Interface TryWithResources<R>

All Superinterfaces:
Try<R>
All Known Implementing Classes:
TryBiFunctionWithResources, TryFunctionWithResource
public sealed interface TryWithResources<R> extends Try<R> permits TryBiFunctionWithResources<T,U,R>, TryFunctionWithResource<T,R>
